description: Brown, textured wallet with branding at the frontOne main compartment with a separator sleeveThe left fold has two card holders, a slip pocket and an ID card holder, has a flap with an ID card holder and three card slotsThe right fold has a slip pocket and a coin pocket that is secured with a flap with press button closureWarranty: 180 days against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
